items.title: Pakistan launches deadly strikes on Afghanistan
items.description: Pakistan says the strikes were retaliation for recent suicide bombings in the country.

items.title: More than 1,500 Venezuelan political prisoners apply for amnesty
items.description: The announcement by the head of Venezuela's National Assembly comes amid US pressure following the capture of ex-President Nicolás Maduro.

items.title: Final missing Lake Tahoe skier found dead 5 days after avalanche
items.description: Authorities released the names of the six women and three guides who died in the worst avalanche in state history.

items.title: Willie Colón, trombonist who pioneered salsa music, dies aged 75
items.description: His career spanned 60 years and dozens of albums and had been named among the most influential Latino artists of all time.

items.title: How football is helping girls fight against forced marriage
items.description: Two sisters in an Indian village talk about how football has changed their lives and helped them push back against child marriage.
